text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, here, ma'am! Please sit down!

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: Why, thank you. Here, you can have this, dear.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Good deeds are as sweet as carrot candy... Ooh, I
should write that down before I for—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I-I forgot... I get dizzy when I write on the train...

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Are you all right?! Get off at the next station
with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O tries to be helpful by giving up
her seat, but due to her motion sickness, she ends
up being the one in need of help...
